title: abutilon subprostratum
intro: Abutilon subprostratum is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Abutilon subprostratum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Abutilon subprostratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy.
